#("=====> MUME MERCENARY MANAGEMENT ")

#alias hire_merc={say help;give 10 silver mercenary}

#alias merc_health={ask mercenary health;ask mercenary hits;ask mercenary hurt}
#alias merc_moves={ask mercenary moves;ask mercenary tired}
#alias merc_pay={ask mercenary payment;ask mercenary pay;ask mercenary time}

#alias merc_stand={ask mercenary stand}
#alias merc_flee={ask mercenary flee}

#alias merc_ride={ask mercenary ride $1}

#action >+merc_yell ^&1 yells '&2'={#print ("Mercenary yelled from "+$1)}

#action >+merc_assist ^&1 assists you.={#print ("Mercenary is now assisting you.")}
#action >+merc_fumble ^&1 fumbles and retreats from battle.={#print;say assist}

#alias report_merc={merc_health;merc_moves;merc_pay}
